headline: Buy 5 Non-Tech Wide Moat Stocks to Strengthen Your Portfolio
summary: BIIB, LMT, NOC, MA and MTD are five non-tech wide moat picks as durable advantages, defense demand, and digital payments growth position these stocks for resilient returns.
